TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mathias_Anderle, title = Mathias_Anderle, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mathias_Anderle} }

S.FORM: Mathias Anderle kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 7, Mathias Anderle, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Mathias Anderle kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 7, Mathias Anderle, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: matħias~ɕ an*erle kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, matħias~ɕ an*erle, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
